title: Enemies
subtitle: {{count}} monster types across 5 acts. Each has unique elemental properties, resistances, and 5 attack patterns.
resistCapDesc: Maximum resistance per element is capped at {{cap}}%. Boss rarity gets +{{bonus}}% bonus to all resistances on top of their base values.
attacksSub: Each monster type has 5 unique attack patterns with different elemental splits and weighted probabilities. Enemies attack once per second.
attacksDesc: Enemy damage scales with location order, act, and rarity. Rare, epic, and boss monsters hit significantly harder. Damage also has slight random variance, keeping combat unpredictable.
